word: H5265 - נָסַע - nâçaʻ - naw-sah' - Cause to blow

sections.paragraph:
Original: נסע

Transliteration: nâsa‛

Phonetic: naw-sah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to pull out, pull up, set out, journey, remove, set forward, depart
    1. (Qal)
      1. to pull out or up
      2. to set out, depart
      3. to journey, march
      4. to set forth (of wind)
    2. (Niphal) to be pulled up, be removed, be plucked up
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to set out, lead out, cause to spring up
      2. to remove, quarry

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1380

Part(s) of speech: Verb
